rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is a game-theoretic explanation of exchange-level format choice under header bidding, while the cited paper focuses on advertiser-level budget-constrained bidding algorithms in sequential second-price auctions. This indicates topical overlap (RTB) but different analytical level and method, and the only linkage provided is a single DOI match with no in-text citation context. Given the sparse evidence, it is not safe to confidently drop or keep as clearly substantive.
